title: 2024年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Could you check my report, please?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. When do you need it by?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Five o'clock.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I'll do it after lunch, then.
questions.explanation: 「5時までに」に1の「じゃあ昼食後にやるよ」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昼食後にやる」→正解。2「もう2杯飲んだ」→無関係。3「昨日買った」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This pizza is delicious!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah, it's really good.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I think this is the best Italian restaurant in town.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「町で一番のイタリアンだと思う」に1の「同意するよ」が自然。
highlights: the best Italian restaurant in town
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「同意する」→正解。2「はい、ある」→不自然。3「大丈夫でしょう」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you like hiking?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I went to Mt. Baker yesterday. Have you been there?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not yet.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「まだ行ってない」に2の「早く行った方がいいよ」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ブーツありがとう」→無関係。2「早く行くべき」→正解。3「楽しめてよかった」→男性は行ってない。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can you help me to study French?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I think you should ask James.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I hope you enjoy your trip.
questions.explanation: 「なぜジェームズ？」に3の「フランス語が得意だから」が理由として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「旅行楽しんで」→無関係。2「今日は病気」→勧める理由にならない。3「フランス語が得意」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go to a movie tonight.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Shall we meet outside the theater at six?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「6時に映画館の前で会おう」に2の「行くよ」が適切。
highlights: Shall we meet outside the theater at six
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「悲しい映画」→待ち合わせの返事でない。2「行くよ」→正解。3「楽しんで」→一緒に行く。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to our restaurant.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Everything looks so delicious!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thank you. What would you like to order?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ご注文は？」に1の「まだ決めてない」が自然。
highlights: What would you like to order
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「まだ決めてない」→正解。2「私のじゃない」→無関係。3「嬉しい」→不自然。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello, ABC Company.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, is Mr. Thompson there?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sorry, he's in a meeting. Would you like to leave a message?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「伝言を残しますか？」に2の「後で掛け直します」が自然。
highlights: Would you like to leave a message
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「見つけた」→会議中。2「掛け直す」→正解。3「私もいた」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no, we missed the bus!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: There's another one in 15 minutes.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Should we wait or walk?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「待つか歩くか」に1の「次のに乗ろう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「次のに乗ろう」→正解。2「私の車」→無関係。3「明日行ける」→今行く話。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I hear your family is going on vacation.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, we're flying to Europe.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you going soon?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「もうすぐ行くの？」に1の「来週出発する」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「来週出発」→正解。2「ヨーロッパには行かない」→行くと言った。3「昨日出発した」→今ここにいる。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Susan.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Jay. You look so tired!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, my soccer team lost our match today.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「試合に負けた」に1の「それは残念」が適切。
highlights: my soccer team lost our match today
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「それは残念」→正解。2「疲れてない」→ジェイの話。3「簡単だ」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Grandpa, weren't you a science teacher when you were younger?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's right.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want to be a teacher, too, but I want to teach P.E.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great.

questions.question: What does the girl want to do?
questions.explanation: 「体育の先生になりたい」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「理科の先生」→祖父の職業。2「体育の先生」→正解。3「祖父の学校を訪問」→言及なし。4「科学博物館」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This restaurant is great, Tom.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. I come here every Tuesday and Saturday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Wow, you're a good customer.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I love the food, but it's too expensive to come every day.

questions.question: How often does Tom eat at the restaurant?
questions.explanation: 「毎週火曜と土曜に来る」→週2回。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「月1回」→週2回。2「週1回」→週2回。3「週2回」→正解。4「毎日」→高すぎると否定。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Ryan, it's eleven o'clock.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I know. I'll go to bed when I finish this book.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. Go to sleep now. You have school tomorrow.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, Mom. Good night.

questions.question: What will Ryan do next?
questions.explanation: 母に言われて「今すぐ寝る」ことにした。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「寝る」→正解。2「本を読み終える」→母に止められた。3「宿題をする」→言及なし。4「学校に行く」→明日。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is that the school newspaper?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. Look on page 4.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Wow! It's a story about our drama club.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. I think Ms. Butler wrote it.

questions.question: What is on page 4 of the school newspaper?
choices: A story about a famous actor.
A photo of a school building.
questions.explanation: 「演劇部についての記事」がある。
highlights: a story about our drama club
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「クラブの記事」→正解。2「バトラー先生の写真」→記事を書いた人。3「有名な俳優の話」→言及なし。4「校舎の写真」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, can I use the computer this morning?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure, but Frank needs it this afternoon.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What for?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To write an e-mail to Uncle Joe.

questions.question: Who needs to use the computer this afternoon?
questions.explanation: 「フランクが午後に使う」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「女の子」→今朝使う。2「父」→言及なし。3「フランク」→正解。4「ジョー叔父」→メールの相手。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me, how do I get to the post office?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Go straight along this road about 10 blocks.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's too far to walk. I'll take a taxi.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good idea. The bus doesn't come very often.

questions.question: How will the woman get to the post office?
questions.explanation: 「タクシーで行く」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「徒歩」→遠すぎる。2「タクシー」→正解。3「バス」→あまり来ない。4「自転車」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When does the next movie start?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: In about seven minutes. The one after that starts at four.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. Two tickets for the next movie, please.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That'll be $30.

questions.question: How many tickets does the man want to buy?
questions.explanation: 「次の映画のチケット2枚」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2枚」→正解。2「4枚」→4時の映画と混同。3「7枚」→7分と混同。4「8枚」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Susan. It's Pete. I heard the kids' soccer game was canceled.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, the coach caught a cold.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, I thought it was canceled because it was raining.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, that wasn't the reason.

questions.question: Why was the game canceled?
questions.explanation: 「コーチが風邪をひいた」が理由。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「雨」→理由ではないと否定。2「コーチが病気」→正解。3「スーザンが忙しい」→言及なし。4「ピートの体調」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello, when does the library open tomorrow?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It opens at 8:00 a.m. every day.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: And what time does it close?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: We close at 7:00 p.m. tomorrow, but on weekends we close at 5:00 p.m.

questions.question: When does the library close tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 「明日は7時に閉館」。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you enjoy the festival this weekend?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Actually, I went to the beach. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went shopping at the mall, then to a movie.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sounds great!

questions.question: Where did the man go on the weekend?
questions.explanation: 「実はビーチに行った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「フェスティバル」→行っていない。2「映画」→女性。3「モール」→女性。4「ビーチ」→正解。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sally loves to play the violin. This Saturday night, her parents are taking her to a concert. A famous violinist will perform. Sally is looking forward to listening to his music.

questions.question: What will Sally do this Saturday night?
questions.explanation: 「土曜の夜、コンサートに行く」。
highlights: her parents are taking her to a concert
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「音楽家と話す」→言及なし。2「コンサートに行く」→正解。3「バイオリンを練習」→聴きに行く。4「家族に演奏」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Kelly went to a French restaurant last Wednesday. The waiter was very nice. The food was delicious, but she ate too much. Next time, she won't order dessert.

questions.question: What was Kelly's problem?
questions.explanation: 「食べすぎた」が問題。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「フランス語が話せない」→言及なし。2「食べすぎた」→正解。3「料理がひどい」→美味しかった。4「ウェイターが不親切」→とても親切。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I love shopping for clothes. Yesterday, I bought a new sweater. It's green and white, and it has a picture of a flower on it. It's really cool.

questions.question: What is the girl talking about?
questions.explanation: 新しいセーターの話をしている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しいセーター」→正解。2「好きな色」→セーターの色。3「花屋」→花の絵。4「有名な絵」→セーターの柄。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Paula started taking violin lessons one month ago. She has lessons on Tuesday and Friday afternoons. She's only had eight lessons, but she's already able to play four simple songs.

questions.question: How many violin lessons has Paula had?
questions.explanation: 「まだ8回しか受けていない」。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't have any homework today, so I'm going to play badminton at the park. But I have to wash the dishes before I leave.

questions.question: When will the boy go to the park?
choices: After going to a sports store.
questions.explanation: 「皿洗いをしてから出かける」。
highlights: I have to wash the dishes before I leave
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題の後」→宿題はない。2「皿洗いの後」→正解。3「バドミントンの後」→これからする。4「スポーツ店の後」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Attention, passengers! Thank you for using the Central Train Line. The train schedule will change next week. Please visit our website to see the new schedule.

questions.question: How can passengers see the new schedule?
questions.explanation: 「ウェブサイトをご覧ください」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「駅に行く」→ウェブサイト。2「チケットを買う」→言及なし。3「電車に乗る」→言及なし。4「ウェブサイトを見る」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I wanted to give my friend a birthday card. I didn't buy one from the shop. Instead, I made it at home using colorful paper and some glue.

questions.question: What did the boy do for his friend?
questions.explanation: 「家でカードを手作りした」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「プレゼントを買った」→手作り。2「ケーキを焼いた」→言及なし。3「カードを作った」→正解。4「パーティーを企画」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: During the holidays, Mark goes to see his aunt in the country. This year, he was happy because she had a new pet. It was a white rabbit. It was a gift from her friend.

questions.question: Why was Mark happy?
choices: His aunt had a new rabbit.
questions.explanation: 「叔母が新しいペットを飼っていたから嬉しかった」。
highlights: he was happy because she had a new pet
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「友達に会った」→叔母に会った。2「叔母が新しいウサギを飼っていた」→正解。3「ケーキを焼いた」→言及なし。4「プレゼントをもらった」→叔母がもらった。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good evening, this is the news. The city zoo has a new baby giraffe. It was born today. People can see the baby giraffe in two weeks. The staff members hope that many people will come to visit.

questions.question: When can people see the baby giraffe?
questions.explanation: 「2週間後に見られる」。
highlights: People can see the baby giraffe in two weeks
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日」→生まれた日。2「明日」→言及なし。3「明後日」→言及なし。4「2週間後」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When it's hot outside, my friends and I have a favorite place. It's the city pool. We swim in the cool water. On cold days, we play soccer in the park or watch movies at a friend's house.

questions.question: Where do they go when it is hot?
questions.explanation: 「暑い日はシティプールに行く」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「シティプール」→正解。2「映画館」→家で見る。3「公園」→寒い日。4「友達の家」→寒い日。
